beats.speaker: Karen
beats.text: You smell like... is that cologne? You don't own cologne.

beats.speaker: Mother-in-Law
beats.text: David. Come here. Let me look at you in the light.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Ha. Haha. It's, uh, it's a whole day, Karen. Lot of errands. Big day of errands.
Barb's lawyer-daughter takes one slow sip of chardonnay and does not blink.

end_a.text: Dad smiles the smile of a hostage. Karen files it away.

end_b.text: "...and THAT'S why the edger was, you know, the edger. Anyway." Nobody bought it. Nobody.
